programme.title: News Tonight - EP 59
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 61
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) A photo at Xianshu's house stirs something in Xiangfan. Xianshu drives Xiangfan back to the nursing home and finally admits they were once married.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 62
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhengmin is left unconscious after a car accident. When Xixiu hears the news, she suspects Yajun of trying to harm him. Meanwhile, Yajun considers Minghua, who had argued with Zhengmin earlier, to be another key suspect.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 266
programme.desc: Comvita 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 251
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 288
programme.desc: Enhance memory, focus, and mental clarity with Phosphatidylserine (PS), Ginkgo, DHA, and Acetyl L-Carnitine. Supports circulation, nerve health, and cognitive performance-just one tablet a day to stay sharp. Perfect for students, busy professionals, and seniors.

programme.title: The Treasured Voice S5 - EP 3
programme.desc: Into its 5th season, music veterans such as Jeff Chang and David Tao will collaborate with the new generation singers and perform popular hits of the era, striving to own the song and outperforms the classic. Continuing the "captain system" of last season, the two teams of musicians lined up in the team to help each other and strive to create the highly anticipated "Mega Hit".

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 313
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants-Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect-with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 314
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use-helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 298
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours-lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results-ideal for small families.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 9
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests - including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more - as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Ampun King! Kopi Pahit Tapi Mbanya Manis

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Coba-Coba Cintanya Bikin Terjaga-Jaga
programme.desc: Ryan (Kevin Hillers) is a struggling single father who sells toys to survive. When a famous influencer, Rosa (Valerie Ivanka), tries to help his child cross the street, a paranoid Ryan films the encounter and accuses her of kidnapping. The video goes viral, ruining Rosa’s reputation. To save her career, Rosa’s manager orders her to get close to Ryan and convince him to clear her name.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 8
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 154
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PUTRI MASIH DI EMPANG UNTUK SETIA
programme.desc: Lastri (Amanda Salma) has always resented her sister, Putri (Yasmine Napper), believing their father loves Putri more. The rivalry intensifies when Yuda (Ridwan Ghani), an old high school friend, returns to the village. Yuda is on a mission to find a soulmate who possesses a necklace identical to his own.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 206
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 206
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Gak Naksir Cewek Cleaning Glowing
programme.desc: Salsa’s (Soraya Rasyid) dream trip to Korea is canceled after her family suddenly goes bankrupt. To support herself, she takes a job as a cleaning service worker. At her workplace, she meets Al (Masaji Wijayanto) and El (Jeremiah Rakesh), two bickering brothers who both fall for her and start a fierce competition for her heart.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 8

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 155
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: RAKET PENYABET JODOH
programme.desc: Maya (Michelle Ziudith) is in a rush and gets into a fight with Miko (Lucky Perdana) over an ojek. She later discovers that Miko is her new badminton coach. Miko underestimates Maya’s skills, demoting her to the bench and claiming she isn't ready for the main team, sparking a fiery determination in Maya to prove him wrong.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 207

programme.title: Undian Memang Salah Tapi Hasilnya Kita Berjodoh
programme.desc: Determined to avoid her wedding with Bimo, Julia flees her home on a trail bike. She enlists her best friend, Iis, to help stage her disappearance. A desperate Bimo chases her in a pickup truck, shouting for her to stop as Julia races toward her freedom.

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: Si Manis Jembatan Perasaan Aku dan Kamu
programme.desc: In need of money, Syafira (Rachquel Nesia) takes a unique job in Yogyakarta as a 'Kuntilanak' cosplayer to scare young couples at the beach. During her shift, she accidentally crashes into a visitor named El (Fendy Chow). El is terrified when Syafira’s wig ends up on his head, and even more shocked when she deadpans that it’s 'ghost hair

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 208
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Idolanya Kaum Mendang Mending Jangan Ya Dek Ya!!
programme.desc: Dadang (Jeff Smith) is so obsessed with dangdut singer Jenita Janet that he neglects his work, infuriating his mother. He hitches a ride on a truck to Jakarta to meet his idol, unaware that a local girl named Lilis (Raisya Bawazier) has sneaked along to see the National Monument (Monas). Lilis’s presence turns Dadang’s simple mission into a chaotic disaster.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 10

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 37
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 6
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 15
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 9
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 4
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 7
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 23
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 5
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 2
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah program untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 7
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 40
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Mind Your Loghat - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang memartabatkan dialek, budaya dan makanan asli. Dua selebriti akan menyediakan hidangan dari kampung halaman dan mesti bercakap dengan dialek negeri mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Dik? - EP 1

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 4
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Asmara Beijing
programme.desc: Dira bercuti ke Beijing bersama kawannya, Shima untuk menenangkan fikiran selepas putus cinta dengan Rizal. Ketika di Beijing, Salina bertemu bekas kekasihnya, Imran.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends Live - EP 5
programme.desc: Kumpulan pelawak popular, Bocey kembali beraksi dengan sketsa komedi yang menarik. Nantikan siapakah tetamu istimewa yang akan beraksi bersama mereka.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 6

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2023 - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan hiburan untuk seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Klik Riders - EP 16

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Diterajui oleh Sherry Alhadad, Roy Azman & Haiqal Hairuddin dibantu selebriti jemputan demi merebut hadiah tunai dua kali ganda bernilai RM1 juta dengan beberapa syarat.

programme.title: Romeo Returns - EP 7
programme.desc: Saksikan jejaka idaman Malaya bersatu dalam sebuah program realiti yang bakal mencabar mereka dengan pelbagai aktiviti yang menguji keupayaan fizikal dan mental jejaka terhangat di pasaran ini.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 5
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Elak - Elak - EP 1
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bersama barisan atlit handal dan selebriti popular tanah air, sakasikan mereka berentap dalam acara sukan dan permainan menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 5
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik minggu ini untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 1
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 4
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 3
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 3
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Makan - EP 11
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 11
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Masaklah Kau - EP 8

programme.title: Taal
programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Silsiilay
programme.desc: Three women face heartbreak in love: one betrayed by her husband, one ignored by an ambitious lover, and one trapped with a wealthy man who feels wrong inside. Release Year: 2005 Director: Khalid Mohamed

programme.title: The Accidental Prime Minister
programme.desc: Manmohan Singh, a quiet economist, becomes India's prime minister. Amid political storms and challenges, he navigates a decade of leadership with resilience and quiet determination. Release Year: 2019 Director: Vijay Gutte

programme.title: Bas Itna Sa Khwaab Hai
programme.desc: A small-town man joins his idol's news channel, chasing fame, but ambition traps him in manipulation and moral compromise that costs him everything he values. Release Year: 2001 Director: Goldie Behl Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Madhura Raja
programme.desc: When an illegal hooch baron's reign of terror troubles an entire village, the people turn to the only man who can save them: Raja, the flamboyant don with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Uri - The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Indian army special forces execute a covert operation, avenging the killing of fellow army men at their base by a terrorist group. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Dhar

programme.title: Welcome 2 Karachi
programme.desc: Two men who organise wedding events on boats end up on the beaches of Karachi when their boat capsizes mid-sea. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashish R. Mohan

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Set during the 1975 Emergency in India, the film explores political events under Indira Gandhi and the impact of her decisions on the nation. Release Year: 2025 Director: Kangana Ranaut

programme.title: Super Singh
programme.desc: A simple man gains mysterious superpowers and begins a life changing journey where love, courage, sacrifice, and self belief teach him his true purpose in the world.

programme.title: Uri - The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Indian army special forces execute a covert operation, avenging the killing of fellow army men at their base by a terrorist group. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Dhar

programme.title: Welcome 2 Karachi
programme.desc: Two men who organise wedding events on boats end up on the beaches of Karachi when their boat capsizes mid-sea. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashish R. Mohan

programme.title: Suhaag
programme.desc: Ajay and Raj are prank-loving college friends. When Ajay needs his birth certificate, he discovers a shocking truth about his identity that changes everything he thought he knew about himself.

programme.title: Rustom
programme.desc: Naval officer Rustom's perfect life shatters when he learns of Cynthia's affair and becomes the prime suspect in her lover's murder, forcing him to fight for truth.

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A married man's life turns chaotic when he secretly cheats on his wife, leading to confusion, misunderstandings, and escalating comedy involving his friends and their relationships. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Shakti - The Power
programme.desc: A couple Nandini and Shekhar return to India and get caught in the bitter animosity between Shekhar's father and another group in this film. Release Year: 2002 Director: Krishna Vamsi

programme.title: Madhura Raja
programme.desc: When an illegal hooch baron's reign of terror troubles an entire village, the people turn to the only man who can save them: Raja, the flamboyant don with a heart of gold.

programme.desc: Escaping from the police in Agra, Rani and Rishu decide to elope together. When their plan goes awry, Rani seeks a helping hand from a kind admirer.

programme.title: Major
programme.desc: The life of Maj. Sandeep Unnikrishnan, who fought against terrorists and was killed in action during the 2008 attacks at the Taj Palace Hotel in Mumbai, India.

programme.desc: Pratap travels to Mumbai for better career opportunities. He gains success and falls in love with the daughter of his boss. On the day of his engagement, Pratap gets arrested for a murder.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Shekhar threatens to expose Ratan's secret if he does not help him in a heist. A desperate Ratan assists Shekhar, but ends up becoming the prime suspect.

programme.desc: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

programme.desc: A devoted grandson embarks on a complicated and comic journey to fulfill his ailing grandmother's last wish.

programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Partis Skier - EP 9
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore the Wapta Glacier, on the border of Alberta and British Columbia, to discover what characterizes glacier skiing.

programme.title: La Cuisine D'isabelle Et Ricardo - EP 12
programme.desc: The chef welcomes Luca Cianciulli, owner of Moccione and Moccione Pizza. Together, they prepare a grilled flank steak with rosemary, served with lime salsa verde and a potato salad.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 16
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits a flea market in La Rochelle, in Charente-Maritime.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: La Cuisine D'isabelle Et Ricardo - EP 12
programme.desc: The chef welcomes Luca Cianciulli, owner of Moccione and Moccione Pizza. Together, they prepare a grilled flank steak with rosemary, served with lime salsa verde and a potato salad.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Partis Skier - EP 9
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore the Wapta Glacier, on the border of Alberta and British Columbia, to discover what characterizes glacier skiing.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 17
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 21
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: La Cabane a Histoires - EP 19
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: La Cabane a Histoires - EP 20
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 49
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 27
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 27
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 1
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 2
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 27
programme.desc: After the death of her son the previous year, Lana Delaunay changed her life and now runs a restaurant in a seaside resort. When 22 year old Magali is found murdered, Marleau suspects a link between the two cases. To solve this new crime, the captain must unearth old grudges from the past.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 7
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: ama Gloria
programme.desc: Six-year-old Cleo lives with her kind, but often absent father, and her nanny Gloria, who she loves. But Gloria has to definitively return to Cap Verde to look after her children. The separation is brutal and Cleo is crushed. Her father sends her to spend the summer with Gloria.

programme.title: La Grande Arche
programme.desc: When the austere district of La Defense, a symbol of modernity, becomes the setting for a reflection on architecture, memory, and power.

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: Ni Tabac Ni Cancer, Le Combat D'une Vie
programme.desc: Marie-Pierre Revel is a radiologist, a specialist in pulmonary diseases. For years she has been fighting against lung cancer, now the leading cause of cancer mortality among women. Her goal: to raise awareness among as many people as possible about the scourge of tobacco and to screen at-risk individuals through scans.

programme.title: Ex Utero
programme.desc: Navigating between history and contemporary testimonies, ''Ex utero'' crosses three time periods and three places: the Middle Ages in Belgium, the 18th century in Alabama and the 20th century in Auschwitz. In response to centuries of practices, women recount the gynaecological abuse they have suffered.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 45
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 46
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 11
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca - EP 39
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 1
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 4
programme.desc: The spectators go wild when Mouse takes the lead in the skateboarding competition: she manages a 1440, a figure no-one has ever successfully completed.

programme.title: Belfort & Lupin - EP 1
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 46
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 27
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 37
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 23
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 7
programme.desc: Ibrahim has Down syndrome and has been working for eight years as a waiter at Le Reflet, an inclusive restaurant that employs people with disabilities. Born in France to Lebanese parents and trained in hospitality, he has built his path with rigor and determination, a story of autonomy and transmission.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 89
programme.desc: She's a huge star, a legend of French and world athletics. Double world champion, triple Olympic champion, an exceptional record in French sport: Marie-Josee Perec is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 11
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski explores francophone artistic creation, from the craftsmanship of Moulin Rouge costume designers to African urban dances. He meets Maxime Fontanier, workshop manager, and Mine Verges, director and living memory of the creation workshops of the legendary Parisian cabaret. Together, they reveal the rigor and meticulousness of the costume designers, feather workers and embroiderers who create the sumptuous revue costumes.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 4
programme.desc: An authority in the world of rafting, Derek Klapka accompanies tourists seeking both a challenge and spectacular scenery. In New Zealand, at the head of a group of rafters, he takes on the rapids of the Rangitikei River, where the prehistoric era seems ever-present.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 10
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 25
programme.desc: On the menu: crunchy chicken burger, oven-baked poutine, apple and caramel brioche, chocolate and chai tart.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Mort Sur Terre Battue
programme.desc: During a prestigious tennis tournament, the lifeless body of player Manon Picard is found on the court. The motive appears to be linked to the lucrative contract she signed with a sponsor. Investigators Romain Fabiot and Camille Lauristan are assisted by Vincent Beti, a former player with a troubled past.

programme.title: Movie - Rajavamsam
programme.desc: When an IT team lead, Kannan, bags a project with a tight deadline and intense rivalry, he's also pressured by his large family to tie the knot. To get them off his back, he takes home a colleague Gayathri to pose as his girlfriend, but ends up marrying her.

programme.title: Movie - Samurai
programme.desc: Thiyagu's friend commits suicide after failing to gather support to expose a drug racket in her college. Thereafter, he runs a rebel mission every night to punish the corrupt men responsible for it.

programme.title: Movie - Malliswaran
programme.desc: Malliswaran is a Tamil-dubbed movie of a Malyalam fim called Mulla, starring Dileep, Meera Nandan and Biju Menon.

programme.title: Movie - Manase Mounamaa
programme.desc: Arun, a medical student, becomes the new college chairman despite receiving threats from a gangster, Dhana. Dhana sets out to kill Arun but meets with an accident, and Arun ends up saving his life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kadhalukku Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Jeeva loves Mini, but her three brothers end up beating him every time he meets her. The couple decides to elope against their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Movie - Dharmam Vellum
programme.desc: Dharmam Vellum is a 1989 Tamil-language action crime film written, produced and directed by K. Rangaraj.

programme.title: Movie - Peralagan
programme.desc: Chinna, a phone booth operator, falls for a woman who is blind, and wants to help her regain her eyesight. On the other hand, Kartik, his lookalike, is in love with the police commissioner's daughter.

programme.title: Movie - En Aasa Raasave
programme.desc: When a young boy who works as a street dancer finds out that his mother is alive, he decides to locate her, and struggles to reunite his separated parents.

programme.title: Movie - Jayam
programme.desc: A young woman's marriage is arranged with her first cousin by her parents during her childhood, but she falls in love with another guy. When the parents fix her marriage with the cousin, she elopes with her lover.

programme.title: Movie - Trip
programme.desc: A group of friends travelling in a dense forest accidentally meet two strangers who they think are killers. Things get complicated when they get caught by the real killers.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026 1st Rd M2: Canada vs Brazil
programme.desc: 26 teams from the opening round of qualifiers will play for 13 spots at the 2nd round qualifiers in a series decided on a home and away basis played as a best of 5 matches as the 114th edition of the Davis Cup gets under way.

programme.title: ATP Originals Series The Ring Master: Alexander Bublik
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Grand Prix Sar La Princesse Lalla Meryem (250) Final
programme.desc: The Grand Prix Sar La Princesse Lalla Meryem is an annual professional women's tennis tournament held in Rabat, Morocco. Founded in 2001, the tournament was originally held in Casablanca before moving to Rabat in 2005.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 bitpanda Hamburg Open
programme.desc: A look back at the 120th edition of the Hamburg Open from the Am Rothenbaum in the Harvestehude quarter.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 PERODUA Malaysia Masters (S500) SF Session 1
programme.desc: The Malaysia Masters is an annual international badminton tournament held in Malaysia. Held at the Unifi Arena in Kuala Lumpur, it features a total prize purse of US$500,000. The tournament has been held annually since 1985.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Day 4 Session 1 Tie 2: Japan vs England (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Badminton Unlimited 2026
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Thomas Cup QF 4 (C2): France vs Japan
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Presidential Cycling Tour of Turkiye
programme.desc: The Presidential Cycling Tour of Turkey is an annual professional road bicycle racing stage race. It is the only intercontinental cycling tour in the world, often spanning both Europe and Asia. The race typically consists of 8 stages covering diverse terrains.

programme.title: Billie Jean King Cup by Gainbridge Qualifiers 2026 H/L Show
programme.desc: Relive all the tension and drama from seven victorious nations as they booked their spot in the finals in China, Shenzhen.

programme.title: LPGA Tour 2026 ShopRite LPGA powered by Wakefern Round 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The ShopRite LPGA Classic is a women's professional golf tournament on the LPGA Tour in Galloway, New Jersey, near Atlantic City. programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Day 5 Session 2 Tie 2: Indonesia vs France (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

They receive membership on the PGA Tour and the European Tour for the following 5 seasons.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Manchester City (MW01) - EP 6
programme.desc: No side has won more or scored more v Wolves at Molineaux than Man City over last 5 seasons.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Arsenal (MW01) - EP 9
programme.desc: Arsenal have won 2 of last 5 PL visits to Old Trafford (D1 L2) - had won only 1 of previous 18 PL visits (D6 L11).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW02) - EP 12
programme.desc: Erling Haaland has scored 48 goals in 48 home Premier League appearances for Man City. The only player to hit 50 Premier League home goals in fewer than 50 appearances is Alan Shearer, who scored his 50th home goal in his 47th game.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Manchester City (MW01) - EP 6
programme.desc: No side has won more or scored more v Wolves at Molineaux than Man City over last 5 seasons.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Arsenal (MW01) - EP 9
programme.desc: Arsenal have won 2 of last 5 PL visits to Old Trafford (D1 L2) - had won only 1 of previous 18 PL visits (D6 L11).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW02) - EP 12
programme.desc: Erling Haaland has scored 48 goals in 48 home Premier League appearances for Man City. The only player to hit 50 Premier League home goals in fewer than 50 appearances is Alan Shearer, who scored his 50th home goal in his 47th game.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features part 1 of all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season two showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Antonio Margarito vs. Paul Williams
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBO welterweight championship bout between 8-time defending champ Antonio Margarito, aka 'El Tornado de Tijuana' (34-4, 24 KOs) and undefeated Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (32-0, 24 KOs) from the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on July 14, 2007.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania where the top 30 competitors from the Pittsburgh Qualifier tackle the Pittsburgh Finals course.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Juan Diaz
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Juan Diaz with three lightweight titles on the line. This fight earned Fight of the Year honors from The Ring magazine. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 3 features Shodai, Kiribayama, Endo and Ryuden.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 13: Hong Kong - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Wing Chun and Martial Art of Rapid Fire Punches and Kicks with Grandmaster Leung Ting and Sifu Kong Chi Keung.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jermain Taylor vs. Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Javier Fortuna vs. Derrick Wilson
programme.desc: This episode features undefeated 20-year-old Dominican prospect Javier "El Abejon" Fortuna vs Derrick Wilson for the vacant WBC Youth World featherweight title, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Lamont Peterson facing Amir Khan in a light welterweight title bout that ends in a controversial decision due to a point deduction. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 4 features Kotoeko, Mitakeumi, Hakuho and Takanosho.

programme.title: Introducing:
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jermain Taylor vs. Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16) - EP 246

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda-namesake of the Triangle-and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26) - EP 388
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10) - EP 18

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 7
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 13
programme.desc: The team is ecstatic when a newly discovered treasure map turns out to be more accurate than they could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 1
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 4
programme.desc: A frightening assault ends in tragedy when teenagers shoot splat ball guns at two brothers playing a nighttime basketball game. A fight ensues between the youths, leaving a 17-year-old dead at the scene.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 1
programme.desc: Tim suffers from feelings of abandonment and hoarding cars and parts is how he copes. Shortly after Tim and DeeDee married, they lost their home in a fire. After moving to a new home, Tim's hoarding began.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 2
programme.desc: Once they moved into their new home, Tim's hoarding began and continued for years. Now, DeeDee refuses to return home to the mess, and they face the possibility of divorce if he doesn't clean up his hoard.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 3
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 4
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 1
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 2
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 1
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 2
programme.desc: When a member of an elite social club is assaulted, Carisi must convince witnesses to come forward despite the club’s strict confidentiality rules. Chief Tynan offers Benson some extra help. Velasco is confronted with a surprising opportunity.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bruno suspects a bomb was planted to destroy DNA evidence in a rape case. Benson takes on a murder investigation connected to the bombing. Griffin experiences the frustrating setbacks of working an SVU case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 4
programme.desc: When a tween suffers a life-threatening miscarriage, the SVU must unravel a web of online fabrications to identify a suspect. Rollins carefully weighs her career options.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 5
programme.desc: When a woman in active labor is abducted, Rollins and Curry look to her doula for an account of events. Carisi tries to get a confession in front of the jury.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 6
programme.desc: The squad investigates an assault at a house party where no one can identify the assailant. When two suspects are detained for questioning, Rollins takes the chance to turn one against the other.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 7
programme.desc: The SVU must determine fact from fantasy when a famous author twists the details of a serious crime. Fin has a challenging day at work.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 8
programme.desc: When a man claims his girlfriend was kidnapped, Bruno investigates the holes in his story. Tynan comes down hard on Benson after a disagreement. Griffin must defend his policework on the stand.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 9
programme.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect’s home. Carisi and Price team up in court when Brady’s interrogation tactics undermine the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 10
programme.desc: An attempt on a respected judge’s life is connected to an anonymous video posted to the SVU tip line. Rollins tries to help a victim come to terms with their abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 11
programme.desc: When Curry’s son finds a disturbing cassette tape in a thrift store haul, she and Benson must investigate a decades-old missing persons case. Griffin learns a disturbing rumor about his father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 12
programme.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect’s home. Carisi and Price team up in court when Brady’s interrogation tactics undermine the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 13

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13 - EP 13
programme.desc: An airport crisis reveals a larger conspiracy tied to a passenger jet, launching the Intelligence Unit into a dangerous chase for the suspect while the FBI watches closely.

programme.title: The 52nd American Music Awards

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4 - EP 13

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 20

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, "IRL" takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 84
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West

programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
