programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The award-winning series that sets out to uncover the truth behind some of the most powerful stories from around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Sex-for-Work Claims in West Africa's Rubber Industry
programme.desc: An activist seeking to address the alleged abuses contends she has been targeted with litigation to keep her quiet, which the company denied.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with three-time Super Bowl champion Steve Young to discuss the challenges faced and lessons learned on his journey from the NFL to managing a $10 billion fund.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 706
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1659
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 48
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 507
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1974
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.desc: A star-studded, cross-generational travel reality show that documents the unforgettable friendship journey of artists from different generations!

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 86
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 9

programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 26
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2222
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. But Yeung-tin is not listening. While drowning his sorrows alone, Hok-yin runs into Ko Ching, who has come to recover car repair costs. Hok-yin wrongly thinks she is his late mother.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2222
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 10
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 894
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Last Immortal - EP 1
programme.desc: The story tells the story of Gu Jin, the son of the true god, and Ayin, the water-condensing beast, who work together to save the people of the three realms.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong International Chairman Fong Yeung-tin and his mother Mdm Fong Luk Chiu-kwan engage each other in a legal battle as they disagree on the issue of setting up a family trust. Rewind one year, and Fong director Kwong Wai-leung buys some special edition bling form Chung Tak Jewellry, But he discovers it’s a fake, so he vents his anger on Yeung-tin’s eldest son Fong Hok-lai.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. To stabilize Fong share price and prevent Chiu-kwan from worrying, Hok-lai and Hok-kan and their third younger bother Fong Hok-yin decide to suppress the news about Yeung-tin falling into a coma. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The Fongs are in turmoil. Hok-lai and Hok-kan are at their wits’ end in the face of a hostile takeover of their company. Yeung-tin is in a coma. Hok-lai’s uncle Tung Yau-wai seems to secretly hope that Yeung-tin will never come round. Yeung-tin’s buddy Lam Ching disguises herself as a nurse and sneaks into the ward.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen, in her capacity as an ex-girlfriend, visits Ko Sham in the evening. After seeing the doctor, Yeung-tin decides to leave hospital and return to Hong Kong. To prevent the fake jewelry incident from being exposed, Yau-wai gives money to Lai Chung-hing, who is the manager involved, so that he leaves Hong Kong quickly.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. But Yeung-tin is not listening. While drowning his sorrows alone, Hok-yin runs into Ko Ching, who has come to recover car repair costs. Hok-yin wrongly thinks she is his late mother.

programme.title: Honour - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 13
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 14
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Honour - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 7
programme.desc: As a heated argument breaks out between the father and son, Pan-ho begins to question if Kim Sang-hyun’s death was truly an accident.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 1
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 17
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 9
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 12
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 1
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 2
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 9
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 13
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 16
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 17
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 39
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 40
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley is cursed by an evil spirit to not be able to approach any woman. When he falls in love with Siu Yu, Riley's mother decides to use her to help him vanquish the evil spirit. On their wedding night, Riley passes out after protecting Siu Yu from the attack of the evil spirit. Can the two finally break the curse?

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: My Darling Genie
programme.desc: A genie who is trapped in a Chinese oil umbrella helps an honorable young man and his uncle to deal with a covetous loan shark.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter -the sole witness- mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter's company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Casino Tycoon II
programme.desc: This is a sequel to "Casino Tycoon". 20 years after Benny Ho established his casino empire in Macau, his former partner becomes envious and plots to bring him down. At the same time, a young man working for Benny is the son of his ex-lover, and is also out to take revenge on him. Ho however, is not about to take things lying down...

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: This is based on the real-life story of Master Yu Jim Yuen who strives to run his academy in the 1960s, even as the opera culture is declining. Three young men, Sammo Hung, Jackie Chan and Yuen Biao, are determined to train under Master Yu and undergo extremely tough training before they become three of Hong Kong's biggest stars

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: Skyline Cruisers
programme.desc: Four professional thieves are tasked with stealing a cancer vaccine, but they are shocked to discover a pre-set bomb in the laboratory and realize it is a setup against them. Suddenly, a mysterious girl appears, holding a crucial clue that could unravel the conspiracy...

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: An old lady died after mysteriously falling off a building and her ghost appears to haunt the place. This freaked out the security guards, who invite ghostbuster Leo and his female assistant to help. In the process, Leo finds out that the old lady was killed by her son and daughter in law. To rest her soul, Leo promises to bring the couple to justice.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Shui and Tai are lovers who grew up together in a village but move to the city as Tai's father disapproves of their relationship. Tai secretly works in a nightclub to help finance Shui to get the job of a salesman. When Shui is promoted for his good work and finds himself progressing in his career, he begins to feel distant from Tai...

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: In 1920s Shanghai, Chen Zhen goes undercover as a businessman to expose a mob boss's collaboration with the Japanese. While gaining his trust, he must also combat a wave of assassins sent by a brutal Japanese general. Fighting from the shadows in a black mask, he allies with a police captain to protect the city's patriots with his formidable fists.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A gambling master and his partner are hired by the government to investigate another gambler who may be working as a Japanese spy in Shanghai.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm's VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from a famous Japanese manga. 18-year-old Takumi delivers tofu in his father's near-obsolete car every day and becomes a good racer with perfect drifting skill. Encouraged by his father, he joins a mountain race and unexpectedly wins it, making him famous overnight and leading him from one exciting race to another.

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy, where a murdered police officer returns from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie cop into avenging his death.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women's Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei's father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: In this action fantasy movie based on the Chinese legend of the White Snake, a young herbalist falls in love with a thousand-year-old white snake disguised as a woman. When the white snake's true identity is revealed, a sorcerer goes to battle believing that in doing so, he is restoring balance and order between man and the supernatural.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find "The Sutra of 42 Chapters". Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man's matchless fighting skills are revered all over China. Set during the Sino-Japanese War, Ip Man is forced to leave his home and work to support his family. With only his martial arts skills, he reluctantly agrees to train others in the art of Wing Chun for self-defense.

programme.title: The 5 Billion Dollar Legacy
programme.desc: A crippled billionaire mails a letter to each of his long-lost daughters inviting them to go to Japan, in the hope that he will find a worthy heir to inherit his vast fortune. The sisters finally meet abroad the plane to Japan, and one of them is taken with a man who is going to investigate the death of his lawyer uncle in a mysterious hit-and-run.

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: The Pearl Phoenix
programme.desc: In Huangmei Opera tradition, this movie tells the love story of Wen, who sells himself as a slave to a rich family, and Huo, the family's young daughter. The lovers are kept apart by Huo's stepmother and Huo escapes by dressing up as a man. Wen is framed and put into jail so Huo has to go back and rescue her lover!

programme.title: Usurpers Of Emperor's Power
programme.desc: The last ruler of Tang, Li Yao is deposed by Chao Kuang-jun, the founder of the Sung Dynasty. Unfortunately his actions unleash a new plague - his brother Kuang-yi - on the courts and his people. The marauding Kuang-yi rapes and plunders. As more people get involved, it turns into a bloody battlefield of betrayal. It is up to upright officials like Li Lang to put an end to it. But can one man take on the imperial army?

programme.title: House of Traps
programme.desc: An evil prince has hidden the stolen imperial treasures in a house filled with booby-trapped blades. Amid plasma-spurting attacks, heroes and rogues try to uncover the deadly secrets of the house...

programme.title: Tropicana Interlude
programme.desc: Ping and Su are lovers who operate a travel agency specializing in Southeast Asian holidays. Tung, a school mistress, and her students join a guided tour lead by Ping. During the trip, a spoiled kid Li is attracted to Ping but Su thinks Ping has fallen for Tung and leaves. How will Ping deal with the situation and ends up happily back with Su?

programme.title: Disciples of the 36th Chamber
programme.desc: In the finale of this trilogy, Gordon Liu reprises his famous role, Monk San Te, as he tries to protect Fang Shih Yu, an arrogant youth who gets into trouble with the Qing officials, and nearly lands Shaolin Temple into trouble too.

programme.title: The Kingdom and the Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Cheng Te meets country maiden Li Feng on a visit to Southern China. It was love at first sight and the Emperor leaves with a promise that Li Feng would be his empress. When he sends for Li one year later, she was too ill to withstand the arduous journey and arrives just in time to die in the arms of her beloved...

programme.title: Operation Lipstick
programme.desc: A professor's assistant stole a micro-film storing the secret of a newly invented nuclear reactor and sells it to a crime syndicate. However, the micro-film accidentally falls into the hands of a nightclub dancer and a thief in the process, leading to them being relentlessly pursued by the crime syndicate to retrieve the micro-film.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black
programme.desc: Set during the Japanese occupation in World War II, a young orphan Tang Qi falls in a love with a young man Chang. However, their love is filled with challenges, from family pressure to the turmoil of war. When Tang Qi was raped, she is expelled from home to become a nightclub singer and embarks on a journey of no return...

programme.title: Young Vagabond
programme.desc: Su Can, the carefree yet unruly eldest son of a winery owner, is forced to study under a tutor after being expelled from school. He soon discovers that his tutor is a martial arts master and becomes his disciple. However, when his family and master are slain by the ruthless bandit, Centipede, Su Can embarks on a perilous quest for revenge.

programme.title: Song Of Orchid Island
programme.desc: Dr. He moves to the remote Lanyu island off the coast of Taiwan to look for his long lost father, and starts to run a clinic curing islanders who are bitten by the fatal red worms there. He meets Ya Lan who works as a nurse in his clinic and falls in love with him. Things get vicious for Dr. He as a jealous islander plots to get rid of him...

programme.title: Legend Of The Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men's help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the great Chinese classic novel of the same name, the son of renowned Jia family, Bao Yu, is deeply in love with his cousin, Dai Yu. However, his mother disapproves of their relationship and plots to arrange Bao Yu to marry another rich girl, resulting in a tragic ending for the perfect couple.

programme.title: The Golden Knight
programme.desc: The heroine Yu Fei Xia is accused of stealing the book of martial arts secrets. To prove her innocence, she disguises herself as a man and finds her way into the Shaolin Temple to find out the truth...

programme.title: Mist Over Dream Lake
programme.desc: A young girl Chen is sent away by her parents who are going through divorce, to stay with the Chang's. On the Chang's farm, she meets their two sons, the youngest daughter and a young artist, and spends a summer with them that she will never forget.

programme.title: The Lady is the Boss
programme.desc: Wong Hsia Yuan is a traditional kung fu master whose academy is on the brink of closure. Chan Mei Ling arrives from U.S. to revitalize the academy but her way of recruiting students is going beyond questionably legal. Yuan is furious, but when the local triads enter the picture, Yuan and Ling join hands to take back the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers' claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: The Wandering Swordsman
programme.desc: The wandering swordsman Yu Hsieh Erh has formidable sword skills and helps the poor by robbing from thieves and distributing the wealth. He meets a group of bandits who are planning to rob a convoy escorting some valuables and is tricked into participating in the robbery. Yu soon realizes his folly and returns to take revenge on the bandits.

programme.title: Na Cha the Great
programme.desc: Adapted from a chapter of the classic Chinese legend "Investiture of the Gods", this is the story of Na Cha set 3000 years ago. After Na Cha sacrificed his life to save his parents, he is reincarnated with his spirit embodied in a lotus flower and is armed with two magic weapons to save the people from their despotic emperor.

programme.title: The Naval Commandos
programme.desc: The Chinese Navy is attempting to defend its coastline from a Japanese attack, they send their commando unit led by Cui Hsia into the mainland to enlist help to thwart the Japanese before they attack. The commandos enlist the help of Song San and Shiao Liu to kill the Japanese officers led by Shan Mao and destroy their attacking ships.

programme.title: Sex, Love and Hate
programme.desc: This masterpiece spins three interconnected tales about Hong Kong society's differing views on love and what women want from love. Follow a trio of Hong Kong women as they explore relationships and fulfil their hopes of finding true love.

programme.title: Two Champions of Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Qing Dynasty, the Shaolin clan wants to overthrow Qing and restore the Ming Dynasty, while the Wudang clan is backed by the Qing government. The two renowned clans eventually set themselves up against each other, and a series of vicious fighting has just begun...

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: The Lovers Blades, a pair of invincible weapons, are to be delivered to the Qing Emperor. However, they accidentally fell into the hands of Xiao Zhong Hui and Yuan Guan Nan, so Imperial Chief Zhuo Tian Xiong hunts them down for the blades. As the battle begins, the secret of the blades are also revealed.

programme.title: Swift Sword
programme.desc: A righteous swordsman, Bai Yi Pang, seeks revenge on an evil clan but is crippled after being beaten up by them. Years later, a young man encounters Bai who is hiding in a cave. Bai decides to teach this determined young man his Swift Sword skills so that he can help Bai take revenge on the evil clan.

programme.title: Whose Baby is in the Classroom?
programme.desc: Chen, a male teacher in an all girls' high school, is stuck with a baby that isn't his and must take care of it. As he lives on the school grounds, the baby is a source of constant distraction and worry! Luckily, his class warms to the baby and helps him take care of it while he works his charm on Li Ching, an uptight teacher in the same school.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian's rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian's granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: Two Con Men
programme.desc: Two Con Men is a wonderfully twisted, pseudo-romantic comedy in the vein of "Robin Hood" meets "The Sting". Starring Liang Tien as Clever Chan and Chang Ying (who's done over 400 films) as Tricky Ching, it's the age-old competition between a rookie con artist versus the ultimate, experienced flimflam man. It's a game Chen cannot afford to lose, because people's lives - including his own, hang in the balance of good versus evil.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: News Frontline

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Hu's Travel Agency
programme.desc: Hu's Travel Agency features TV host Hu Gua with his children Hsiao-Chen and Hu Shih-An, running Taiwan's "most human-centered travel agency." Centered in Miaoli, they blend family bonds and local culture to create heartfelt journeys.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go
programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 893
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 25
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2221
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen, in her capacity as an ex-girlfriend, visits Ko Sham in the evening. After seeing the doctor, Yeung-tin decides to leave hospital and return to Hong Kong. To prevent the fake jewelry incident from being exposed, Yau-wai gives money to Lai Chung-hing, who is the manager involved, so that he leaves Hong Kong quickly.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: The Last Immortal - EP 1
programme.desc: The story tells the story of Gu Jin, the son of the true god, and Ayin, the water-condensing beast, who work together to save the people of the three realms.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong International Chairman Fong Yeung-tin and his mother Mdm Fong Luk Chiu-kwan engage each other in a legal battle as they disagree on the issue of setting up a family trust. Rewind one year, and Fong director Kwong Wai-leung buys some special edition bling form Chung Tak Jewellry, But he discovers it’s a fake, so he vents his anger on Yeung-tin’s eldest son Fong Hok-lai.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. To stabilize Fong share price and prevent Chiu-kwan from worrying, Hok-lai and Hok-kan and their third younger bother Fong Hok-yin decide to suppress the news about Yeung-tin falling into a coma. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The Fongs are in turmoil. Hok-lai and Hok-kan are at their wits’ end in the face of a hostile takeover of their company. Yeung-tin is in a coma. Hok-lai’s uncle Tung Yau-wai seems to secretly hope that Yeung-tin will never come round. Yeung-tin’s buddy Lam Ching disguises herself as a nurse and sneaks into the ward.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen, in her capacity as an ex-girlfriend, visits Ko Sham in the evening. After seeing the doctor, Yeung-tin decides to leave hospital and return to Hong Kong. To prevent the fake jewelry incident from being exposed, Yau-wai gives money to Lai Chung-hing, who is the manager involved, so that he leaves Hong Kong quickly.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. programme.title: Honour - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.
